name: Pandemic
description: Pandemic is a Legendary Vladof grenade mod from Borderlands 2. It excels when lobbed into groups, especially against weaker armoured targets such as Hyperion troops and knights. A single throw can rapidly spread corrosive damage through a crowd and finish off softer enemies over a short time.
notes:
Each time a child grenade passes the corrosive status effect to a fresh target, a rocket launcher firing sound plays.

Pandemic has fixed corrosive parts, including the Exterminator-style area payload. Storm Front and Fire Bee use the same payload, but their behaviour differs due to separate balancing.

special.description:
Always corrosive. On detonation it releases a corrosive cloud, then spawns 3 homing child grenades. The child grenades stick to enemies and deal damage over time, then move on to new targets, repeatedly transferring corrosion until they expire.

Spread the sickness.
special.title: Spread the sickness.
